action_set_definitions.name: inspect_ventilation_system
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry and state of the ventilation system. This includes fan metrics (RPM, frequency, pressure), damper positions, gas concentrations (CO, CH4, O2), airflow volumes at various branches (face_sweep, exhaust_line, forcing_line), power load, and any active system alarms.

action_set_definitions.name: update_fan_settings
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the operational status and operating frequency of a designated fan. Frequency can be set up to 120 Hz to achieve high-volume airflow requirements.

fan_id.description: The unique ID of the fan (e.g., 'EF-101', 'SF-202').

frequency_hz.description: The operating frequency in Hz. Note: Higher frequencies increase airflow volume.

action_set_definitions.name: update_damper_settings
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the openness percentage of air doors or regulators to control the path of the airflow network.

openness_pct.description: 0 for fully closed, 100 for fully open.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_system_alert
action_set_definitions.description: Acknowledges and clears system-level operational constraints or alarms to permit fan startup or adjustment.

alert_id.description: The identifier of the alarm to resolve.

state_description.fans: Status of all main and local ventilators including RPM, frequency, and operating pressure.
state_description.dampers: Status of air doors and regulators, represented by percentage of openness.
state_description.air_quality_sensors: Mapping of sensor IDs to current readings of Methane (CH4), Carbon Monoxide (CO), and Oxygen (O2).
state_description.airflow_network: Airflow velocity (m/s) and volume (m3/min) at key monitoring branches.
state_description.power_grid_load: Current total power consumption of the ventilation system in kW.
state_description.alarm_system: Active alerts for gas exceedance or fan failure.
